hooks.command: FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(ts|tsx)$ ]] && [[ ! "$FILE" =~ \.test\. ]] && [[ ! "$FILE" =~ \.d\.ts$ ]] && [[ ! "$FILE" =~ /dist/ ]]; then LINES=$(wc -l < "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$LINES" -gt 300 ]; then echo "HARD CEILING VIOLATED: $FILE has $LINES lines (300 max). Split this file now."; exit 1; elif [ "$LINES" -gt 200 ]; then echo "WARNING: $FILE has $LINES lines (soft limit 200). Consider splitting."; fi; fi
